extractions.text: The beam cut through the red fog of the yard like a scalpel through the swollen meat of a wound. A column of light harsher than any noon was drilling into the roof???clinical, probing, the radiance of an examination lamp focused on a single point of interest. He dropped to the grass???the impact jarring his teeth, the ground brittle beneath him as if the earth itself had been dehydrated.
extractions.reasoning: Multiple strong sensory details: visual (cutting beam), tactile (jarring teeth, brittle ground), and a vivid simile for the light's action.

extractions.text: The iron latch on the front door seared his palm even through the hem of his nightshirt. The skin blistered, but he didn't cry out. He twisted the handle and kicked the door open.
extractions.reasoning: Visceral tactile descriptions of pain and physical action.

extractions.text: The red light passed through his skin. His fingers had gone translucent. He could see the dark architecture of his bones, the black web of veins branching beneath the surface. The blood moving through those vessels had slowed. He could feel it???thick, reluctant, dragging through his veins like syrup through a straw.
extractions.reasoning: Specific visual (translucent skin, visible bones/veins) and tactile/internal sensations (slowed, thick blood).

extractions.text: Heat pressed down on him. Not the warmth of fire???this was dry, penetrating, a heat that started in his marrow and radiated outward through the muscle.
extractions.reasoning: Detailed tactile and internal bodily sensations.
